introSection: Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently located at DelGrosso's Amusement Park in Tipton, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Park officials announced the purchase of this roller coaster from the IAAPA Expo in November 2003. It was added to the park for the 2004 season along with Wacky Worm.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains have mouse faces on the front of them.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently located at DelGrosso's Amusement Park in Tipton, Pennsylvania, USA.

Park officials announced the purchase of this roller coaster from the IAAPA Expo in November 2003. It was added to the park for the 2004 season along with Wacky Worm.



The trains have mouse faces on the front of them.
